text: Standing in the corridor and then within the vibrant exhibition space, I feel a curious reverence. The glass-walled meeting room evokes a sense of anticipation, as if knowledge or decisions are waiting to unfold just beyond my reach. Stepping into the R+D exhibit, I am animated by curiosity—the interplay of color, text, and digital display hints at the creative pulse of research and development. I sense that understanding and meaning hover nearby, ready for those attentive enough to grasp them. I feel engaged by potential, ready to question and discover.
